bio: ) is a software developer based in Oslo, Norway, and a founding member of Oslo Perl Mongers. Active in the Perl community for more than two decades, he has organized conferences, hackathons, meetups and more. He was the first organizer of the Perl Toolchain Summit (née Perl QA Hackathon), and is a founding member of the [CPAN Security Group](https://security.metacpan.org/). You can reach him on Mastodon at [@sjn@chaos.social](https://chaos.social/@sjn).
name: Salve J. Nilsen
